Colonoscopy with polyp removal at Monterey Park Hospital.

📍 Monterey Park, CA 1/5 CMS rating CPT 45385

Monterey Park Hospital did not publish a cash-pay price for colonoscopy with polyp removal as of the last refresh.

Insurance rates.

Each row is the range of rates Monterey Park Hospital negotiated with that payer's plans. Your specific rate depends on your plan.

PayerRange
Anthem BCBS$1,514 – $2,590

Patient experience.

CMS HCAHPS patient survey, period ending 03/31/2025 · 295 completed surveys.

Measure This hospital Network avg Δ
HCAHPS overall star rating 2/5 2.8/5 -0.8
Would definitely recommend 58% 69.6% -12pp
Hospital rating 9 or 10 of 10 60% 68.6% -9pp
Nurses always communicated well 75% 75.6% -1pp
Doctors always communicated well 71% 76.6% -6pp
Given clear info about recovery 80% 84.4% -4pp
Room and bathroom always clean 73% 68.6% +4pp
Staff always explained meds 62% 57.6% +4pp
Quiet at night, always 47% 52.2% -5pp

About this price.

This price comes directly from Monterey Park Hospital's machine-readable file (MRF), which the Hospital Price Transparency Rule (45 CFR 180.50) requires every US hospital to publish. We download it, parse the row for CPT 45385, and show you the dollar amount as published.

The cash-pay number is what an uninsured patient would be charged. Insurance-negotiated rates vary by payer and plan — see the table above for the range, or use the comparison tool for plan-specific numbers.

For a national view of colonoscopy with polyp removal prices, see the Colonoscopy with polyp removal overview.

Data sources: CMS Hospital Price Transparency rule (45 CFR 180.50). CMS Hospital Care Compare (xubh-q36u). Last refresh: 2026-04-27.
A consumer reading of CMS-mandated MRF data. Not medical or financial advice. Itemized · itemized.health
